**Overview**

#  DataStream Formats #

##  Available Formats #

Formats define how information is encoded for storage. Currently these formats are supported:

  * [Avro](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/docs/connectors/datastream/formats/avro/>)
  * [Azure Table](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/docs/connectors/datastream/formats/azure_table_storage/>)
  * [Hadoop](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/docs/connectors/datastream/formats/hadoop/>)
  * [Parquet](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/docs/connectors/datastream/formats/parquet/>)
  * [Text files](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-2.3/docs/connectors/datastream/formats/text_files/>)
